specializations: Sensory polymers for precisely tuned texture profiles
Film formers for long-wear and styling applications
Texture enhancement systems for skincare to hair care
product_highlights: Carbopol® carbomers — world's leading rheology modifier for skincare and hair care
Noveon® polycarbophil — stabilizer and bioadhesive thickener
Styleze™ film formers — long-wear performance for styling and color cosmetics
Full range of sensory polymer systems from lightweight serums to rich creams
notes: Lubrizol's personal care division is the world's leading supplier of Carbopol® carbomer polymers, the industry standard for rheology modification in skincare, hair care, and pharmaceutical topical formulations. Their Styleze™ film former range is widely used in styling products and long-wear cosmetics. Lubrizol's sensory polymer portfolio enables formulators to create products with precisely tuned texture profiles, from lightweight serums to rich creams.
